#### Certificate of Establishment & Certified English Translation Please upload a Certificate of Establishment & Certified English Translation of the Certificate of Establishment ensuring it has the following details:
    1. Official document issued by the competent registration authority: – *Federal Iraq*: Ministry of Trade – Companies Registration Department (Baghdad) – *Kurdistan Region*: Ministry of Trade and Industry – General Directorate of Company Registration (Erbil, Sulaymaniyah, or Duhok) 2. Company Name (Must Match Legal Name on CoE. Can accept literal translation in English but must match all other documents containing the English name) 3. Financial Capital 4. Signature from a Registrar Official (in figures and in words) 5. Stamp of Companies Registrar Office 6. Arabic or Kurdish name is identical to that on Tax documents issued by the relevant tax authority (General Commission for Taxes for Federal Iraq, or KRG General Directorate of Taxes for Kurdistan Region) 7. Date 8. Company Registration Number (as shown on Certificate of Establishment). 9. Certified English Translation of Certificate of Establishment must be included within the same PDF. The translation should be signed and stamped by a legal sworn translator and include the translator’s name and date of translation.

### Chamber of Commerce ID Please upload a Chamber of Commerce ID document ensuring that it has the following details:
    1. Official Chamber of Commerce document issued by the competent regional authority: – *Federal Iraq*: Iraqi Federation of Chambers of Commerce (Baghdad) – *Kurdistan Region*: Kurdistan Federation of Chambers of Commerce and Industry (Erbil, Sulaymaniyah, or Duhok) 2. Employee Name (matched to company contacts) 3. Company-Specific

### Tax Card Please upload a Tax Card document ensuring that it has the following details:
    1. Tax Card issued by the relevant authority: – *Federal Iraq*: Ministry of Finance – General Commission for Taxes (GCT, Baghdad) – *Kurdistan Region*: Ministry of Finance – General Directorate of Taxes (KRG) 2. Date - Must be valid

### Tax Clearance Certificate / No Objection Letter Please upload a Tax Clearance Certificate / No Objection Letter ensuring that it has the following details:
    1. Official document issued by the relevant tax authority: – *Federal Iraq*: General Commission for Taxes (Baghdad) – *Kurdistan Region*: General Directorate of Taxes – Ministry of Finance (KRG) 2. Company Name (Must Match Legal Name on CoE. Can accept literal translation in English but must match all other documents containing the English name) 3. Can be addressed to client or the supplier company 4. Must evidence company's TIN 5. Must be signed by an authorized officer 6. Must be stamped by the issuing tax authority (GCT or KRG General Directorate of Taxes) 7. Dated and be the latest obtainable certificate
